description: Full dependency upgrade: Prisma 6â†’7.5, Zod 3â†’4, next-auth v4â†’Auth.js v5, plus all deps to latest compatible versions

userStories.title: Bulk dependency update (non-breaking)
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all minor/patch dependencies updated so the project stays current on bug fixes and security patches.
acceptanceCriteria: Run `pnpm update` to bump all deps within existing semver ranges
Update `eslint-config-next` to latest (16.x to match Next 16)
Update `@types/react` and `@types/react-dom` to latest 19.x (also update the pnpm overrides in package.json to match)
Update all `@radix-ui/*`, `@tanstack/*`, `lucide-react`, `motion`, and other deps to latest compatible
`pnpm typecheck` passes
`pnpm lint` passes

userStories.title: Prisma v7 schema, config, and dependency setup
userStories.description: As a developer, I want Prisma upgraded to v7.5 with the new schema format, generated client output, and CLI config file.
acceptanceCriteria: Upgrade `prisma` (devDep) and `@prisma/client` to ^7.5.0, install `@prisma/adapter-pg` as a dependency
In `prisma/schema.prisma`: change generator provider from `prisma-client-js` to `prisma-client`, add `output = "../src/generated/prisma"`
In `prisma/schema.prisma`: remove `url = env("DATABASE_URL")` from datasource block (keep `provider = "postgresql"` and all comments)
Create `prisma.config.ts` at repo root using `defineConfig` from `prisma/config` with `process.env.DATABASE_URL`
Add `~/generated/*` path alias to `tsconfig.json` paths mapping to `./src/generated/*`
Add `/src/generated` to `.gitignore`
Remove `@prisma/client` and `@prisma/engines` from `pnpm.onlyBuiltDependencies` in package.json (keep `prisma` and `sharp`)
`pnpm prisma generate` succeeds and outputs to `src/generated/prisma/`
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Follow prisma/upgrade-prompt.md for detailed guidance. The prisma.config.ts should use import.meta.dirname for path resolution.

userStories.title: Prisma client instantiation refactor with adapter pattern
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the PrismaClient singleton and all Prisma imports updated to use the v7 adapter pattern with Direct TCP.
acceptanceCriteria: `src/server/db.ts` updated: import PrismaClient from `~/generated/prisma/client.js`, create PrismaPg adapter with `env.DATABASE_URL`, pass adapter to PrismaClient constructor
`src/server/api/routers/blog.ts` updated: change `type Prisma` import from `@prisma/client` to `~/generated/prisma/client.js`
Upgrade `@auth/prisma-adapter` to latest version for Prisma v7 compatibility
Typecheck passes
`pnpm build` passes
userStories.notes: The PrismaPg adapter is imported from @prisma/adapter-pg. The adapter takes { connectionString: env.DATABASE_URL }.

userStories.title: Convert blog-indexer scripts to TypeScript with Prisma v7
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the blog-indexer standalone scripts converted to TypeScript and updated for Prisma v7 adapter pattern.
acceptanceCriteria: Add `tsx` as a devDependency
Rename `src/scripts/blog-indexer.js` to `src/scripts/blog-indexer.ts` with proper TypeScript types added
Rename `src/scripts/index-blog.js` to `src/scripts/index-blog.ts`
Blog indexer uses PrismaClient from generated path with PrismaPg adapter (uses dotenv for env loading since it runs outside Next.js)
Update `package.json` script `blog:index` to use `tsx` (e.g., `tsx src/scripts/index-blog.ts`)
`pnpm blog:index` runs successfully
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: The index-blog script loads dotenv/config before importing blog-indexer. Both scripts run outside Next.js as standalone Node scripts via prebuild.

userStories.title: Zod 3 to 4 migration
userStories.description: As a developer, I want Zod upgraded to v4 with all dependent packages updated for Standard Schema compatibility.
acceptanceCriteria: Upgrade `zod` to ^4.0.0
Upgrade `@t3-oss/env-nextjs` to latest Zod 4 compatible version
Upgrade `@hookform/resolvers` to latest (Zod 4 compatible via Standard Schema)
Upgrade `@trpc/server`, `@trpc/client`, `@trpc/react-query` to latest (Standard Schema support)
In `src/env.js`: replace `z.preprocess()` with `z.unknown().transform().pipe()` pattern for the NEXTAUTH_URL field
Verify `src/server/api/trpc.ts` compiles (ZodError import and .flatten() must still work in v4)
Typecheck passes
`pnpm build` passes
userStories.notes: z.preprocess() was removed in Zod 4. The replacement pattern is: z.unknown().transform((str) => process.env.VERCEL_URL ?? str).pipe(process.env.VERCEL ? z.string() : z.string().url()). Most other Zod APIs (z.object, z.string, z.infer, .safeParse, .parse, .transform) are unchanged in v4.

userStories.title: Auth.js v5 core config migration
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the auth configuration rewritten for Auth.js v5 with the new NextAuth() export pattern.
acceptanceCriteria: Upgrade `next-auth` to v5 (latest stable or beta)
Upgrade `@auth/prisma-adapter` to latest compatible with Auth.js v5
Rewrite `src/server/auth.ts`: export `auth`, `handlers`, `signIn`, `signOut` from `NextAuth()` config using Auth.js v5 API
Auth.js v5 config uses `PrismaAdapter` with the `db` instance from `~/server/db`
Discord provider updated to Auth.js v5 import path
Session callback preserved: `user.id` added to session object
Update module augmentation to Auth.js v5 types if needed
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Auth.js v5 uses: import NextAuth from 'next-auth'; export const { auth, handlers, signIn, signOut } = NextAuth({ adapter, providers, callbacks }). The PrismaAdapter import stays from @auth/prisma-adapter.

userStories.title: Auth.js v5 route handler and session consumers
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the auth route handler and all session consumers updated to use Auth.js v5's auth() function.
acceptanceCriteria: `src/app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts` updated to export `{ GET, POST }` from the `handlers` export of auth config
`src/server/api/trpc.ts` updated: replace `getServerAuthSession()` with `auth()` call imported from `~/server/auth`
Update `src/env.js`: rename `NEXTAUTH_SECRET` to `AUTH_SECRET` if required by Auth.js v5, update NEXTAUTH_URL handling
Update `.env.example` with any changed env var names
Typecheck passes
`pnpm build` passes
userStories.notes: In Auth.js v5, getServerSession(authOptions) is replaced by auth() which is exported from the NextAuth() call. The route handler uses: export const { GET, POST } = handlers.

userStories.title: Final verification and cleanup
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to verify the entire upgrade works end-to-end with no regressions.
acceptanceCriteria: `pnpm prisma generate` succeeds
`pnpm typecheck` passes with zero errors
`pnpm lint` passes with zero errors
`pnpm build` succeeds (includes blog:index prebuild step)
No remaining imports from `@prisma/client` (all should use `~/generated/prisma/client.js`)
No remaining usage of `z.preprocess` anywhere in the codebase
No remaining imports from `next-auth` v4 patterns (getServerSession with authOptions)
userStories.notes: Build prebuild step (blog:index) fails without local database â€” this is expected. The Next.js build itself succeeds when run directly with `SKIP_ENV_VALIDATION=1 npx next build`.
